tasks.title: Remove broken consolidate_weekly_security_summary stub (precondition)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Operational precondition on a gitignored file. Must run first so subsequent modules can be developed against a clean-importing SecurityAgent. Per-spec worktree means sequential anyway.

tasks.title: Storage data models (ReportKind, ReportRef, ReportFilter, SeverityBreakdown, EmbeddedFinding)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Foundation data layer. Every other task imports from here. Could theoretically run in parallel with TASK-1104 (different files), but per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: Postgres schema (security_reports table + indexes)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Column names match TASK-1105 Pydantic field names; must follow the model task. Could run in parallel with TASK-1108 (parsers) if isolation were per-task.

tasks.title: SecurityReportStore Protocol + PostgresS3SecurityReportStore implementation
tasks.parallelism_notes: Core persistence layer; downstream tasks (1109, 1113, 1114, 1116) all depend on it. Cannot parallelize.

tasks.title: Per-scanner parser registry (Trivy, CloudSploit, Prowler, Checkov, Aggregator)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Depends only on TASK-1105 (data models). Could run in parallel with TASK-1106 and TASK-1107 if isolation were per-task — but per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: ReportPersistenceMixin
tasks.parallelism_notes: Composes store + parsers. Producer-toolkit tasks (1110/1111/1112) depend on it.

tasks.title: CloudSploitToolkit mixin integration (with FEAT-160 config threading)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Touches a different file than TASK-1111/1112, so could parallelize across worktrees in theory. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: ComplianceReportToolkit mixin integration
tasks.parallelism_notes: Independent of TASK-1110/1112 file-wise. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: ContainerSecurityToolkit mixin integration + Trivy temp-file lifecycle
tasks.parallelism_notes: Independent of TASK-1110/1111 file-wise; unique because of the resolved U3 temp-file lifecycle. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: SecurityReportToolkit (LLM-facing read side)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Independent of producer-toolkit changes (1110-1112) — could parallelize in separate worktrees. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: WeeklySecuritySummarizer + MonthlySecuritySummarizer (multi-provider × framework)
tasks.parallelism_notes: Independent of toolkit tasks. Could parallelize in separate worktrees. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: parrot/conf.py — AWS_CREDENTIALS['security'] slot
tasks.parallelism_notes: Touches only parrot/conf.py; no dependencies on other FEAT-162 modules. Could run anytime before TASK-1116. Per-spec worktree means sequential.

tasks.title: agents/security.py wiring + scheduled consolidators + BACKSTORY alignment
tasks.parallelism_notes: Final integration. Depends on every prior module. agents/security.py is gitignored so commit diff is empty; integration tests carry verification.

tasks.title: README for parrot/storage/security_reports/
tasks.parallelism_notes: Docs only — could run any time after the store and toolkit are in place. Per-spec worktree means sequential.
